subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath sent down unto them that have believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. O 'Abbas-Quli! The near ones from the draught [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم یا عباسقلی مقربین را از شرب
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
